message:
fix(distributed/encoding): fail closed on incomplete or duplicate source symbols in generate_repair

Previously, a degraded EncodedState with missing or duplicated source
symbols would silently produce incorrect repair data, because
generate_repair assembled the source block from whatever symbols were
present without verifying full coverage. Now
validate_complete_source_coverage() is called before rebuild and rejects
the operation with EncodingError::IncompleteSourceCoverage when:

- Any declared source symbol index is absent from the symbol set
- Any source symbol index appears more than once (duplicate detection)

Three new inline tests cover the rejection paths and Display formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
